'''Monsails''' were large predatory [[Fish/Legends|fish]] native to the swamps of [[Trinta]]. They had long eel-like bodies and large sails on their backs.

==Appearances==
*''[[Domain of Evil]]'' {{Reprint|Domain of Evil}}
